description: Composition Grey round neck T-shirt made of 1005 cotton, has short sleeves with graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in warm water with similar colours Do not dry clean Use a non-chlorine bleach if needed Do not iron on print Authentic jimi hendrix merchandise for the Hendrix fan! In a sober hue, this T-shirt not only panders to your love for the star but also conforms to the minimalist trend of the moment. Wear this with your favourite jeans or dress it up with a structured blazer and formal shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
